name: JiimSmith strategy session advances and hands off to a campaign board
description: Verify the backend strategy loop can start from an idea, advance with feedback, and hand off into a campaign board with plan and asset tasks.

planSteps.description: Send GET {base_url}/api/v1/team/members and store the id of the member whose display_name is Adam (Lead).

Send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/strategy/sessions with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id and inputs containing one idea text: I built an AI tool that verifies AI-generated code before teams ship it.
Verify the response is 200 with a session id, draft, turn_count, and draft sections including audience candidates and positioning angles.
Send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/strategy/sessions/{session_id}/advance with feedback asking to focus on engineering managers who need confidence before merging AI-authored code.
Verify the response is 200, turn_count increases, and the returned session includes the feedback in its turn history.

Send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/strategy/sessions/{session_id}/handoff with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id and JSON body {"review_assets": false}, matching the page's Lock it → draft my first content action.
Verify the response is 200 with a campaign, members, and tasks.
Verify tasks include ideation, planning, and at least one generated asset or visual/review task, with statuses using todo, in_progress, needs_review, done, or blocked.
